title: Pretty Short Spears
description: Shortens the Spear when in hand and in third person
body:
### What is Pretty Short Spears?
Pretty Short Spears, shortens the length of all the spears which may help many players so they can get better visibility.

### Why would you Download it?
Pretty Short Spears improves the visibility which helps in PVP and normal minecraft lets plays by decreasing the field of view covered by the long swords that minecraft haves.
> **Contact:** jagrav.modrinth@gmail.com
